name: Serafim
cooked: Fantastic news and so thankful for your work in making this all possible! I’d suggest Reaper. It’s very inexpensive (also has a fully featured trial that never expires). Is this what you mean by cues/loop points functionality? https://youtu.be/TbiKhJ_9CxM?si=Age_SgfH51GKp9jU&t=126
